chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Const. Petition No. D- 417 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case. 1.For orders on office objection ‘A’ 2. For Hearing of main case. 23.10.2025. Mr. Sajid Hussain Mahessar, Advocate for the petitioner a/w petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. AG for the State. Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Advocate for Respondents No. 5 to 7. -------- Learned counsel for the petitioner after arguing the matter at some length submits that there is legal defect and error including the non-joinder and mis- joinder of the parties in the petition, therefore, he does not press this petition and seeks permission to file a fresh petition after approaching the competent authorities. Learned Additional Advocate General as well as learned Counsel for the private respondents have recorded no objection. In view of the above, the constitutional petition stands dismissed as not pressed. However, the petitioner shall be at liberty to file a fresh petition, subject to the limitations prescribed by law. Judge Judge Abid H. Qazi/**
